the WoD, the one that remove all allies debuff before exalt

Nautila shines in oneshot teams so I’d say swap her out for tinct. You could try switching doll for someone like Karen for buffing your Lotan or ogier for alva for charge build up depending on if you’re running alva as a sub dps or tank since ogier is a decent tank.

You could try any strike buffing wheel, drifting in desire is super mid imo considering with the delay to insta exalt being common with stronger units it won’t be needed. The bleed strike applier, the 100% to fortress strike would be good. If you have mouchette’s 4 star wheel u could use that on a support as well.
